scripts.dev:chroma: docker ps --filter "name=chroma-local" --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -q chroma-local || docker run -d --rm -p 8000:8000 -v chroma-data:/chroma/chroma --name chroma-local chromadb/chroma
scripts.dev: node scripts/kill-orphans.mjs 3001 && pnpm run dev:chroma && concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:server" "pnpm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: pnpm run dev:chroma && CHROMA_HOST=http://localhost:8000 pnpm --filter @kflow-academy/shared build && CHROMA_HOST=http://localhost:8000 pnpm --filter @kflow-academy/server dev
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm run build:client && firebase deploy --only hosting:prod
scripts.deploy:dev: pnpm run build:client && firebase deploy --only hosting:dev
scripts.deploy:server: pnpm run build:server && firebase deploy --only apphosting
scripts.deploy:all: pnpm run deploy:prod && pnpm run deploy:server
